cases.prompt_body: Vertical technical evidence still of an unlabeled cut rubber seal coupon beside a plain metal joint test coupon, one narrow dark eroded edge visible, the object clearly reads as a cut sample rather than a complete ring or recovered flight part, neutral lab evidence light, no labels, no diagrams, no readable markings.

Vertical close evidence still of a cold metal-and-rubber seal interface test article, a thin shadow path along the seam suggests hot gas passing a seal, the carrier reads as a controlled test representation rather than flight hardware, restrained light, no flame, no smoke jet, no labels, no diagram text.

Vertical exterior still of launch pad steelwork in cold morning light, frost and ice visible on service-structure details, the vehicle presence only implied by partial silhouette and scale, cold is factual and restrained rather than theatrical, no explosion, no fireball, no readable markings, no logos.

Vertical still of a small cut seal coupon visually dwarfed by blank administrative evidence carriers, the small dark seam remains the specific cause while the surrounding process absorbs it, restrained institutional light, no text, no labels, no complete O-ring, no recovered hardware, no explosion.
